title: Crispy Umami Jamaican Tofu Skewers
description: A plantbased, crispy tofu skewer packed with umami, Jamaican jerk flavor, and a bright lemon finish-perfect for midnight cravings.
instructions: Drain tofu, press to remove excess water, then cube into 1.5-inch sticks.
In a bowl whisk soy sauce, miso paste, Jamaican jerk spice, lemon juice, maple syrup, and sesame oil until smooth.
Toss tofu cubes in the sauce until evenly coated; let marinate for 15 minutes at room temperature.
Thread 2–3 tofu cubes onto a bamboo skewer; repeat until all tofu is skewered.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat and add 1 tsp coconut oil.
Once oil shimmers, place skewers in the pan; sear 2–3 minutes per side until golden brown and crisp.
Flip skewers using tongs, ensuring even browning; total cooking time 8–10 minutes.
Transfer cooked skewers to a plate lined with paper towels to drain extra oil.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds, chopped scallions, pinch of salt and pepper over the skewers.
Serve immediately with lime wedges or a side of mango salsa for an extra burst of flavor.
